articles.title: Ancient Snake with Legs Found! And It Had a Cheekbone!
articles.summary: A fossil of a 100-million-year-old snake with hind legs was found in Argentina. It had a cheekbone that modern snakes don't have. Scientists used special X-rays to see inside the fossil. The discovery shows that early snakes were big-bodied and big-mouthed, not small burrowers. This changes what we thought about how snakes evolved.

articles.title: Giant Underground Cave Found on Venus!
articles.summary: Scientists found a huge lava tube on Venus by re-examining old radar images from the 1990s. The tube is bigger than any on Earth or Mars. It was discovered near a volcano called Nyx Mons. This finding will help future missions to Venus. The cave might be as wide as 1 kilometer!

articles.title: Meet the Robot That Helps Kids with Anxiety
articles.summary: Professor Maja Matarić created robots that help people through social interaction. Her robots play games with children who have autism and help students with anxiety. She won a big award in 2025 for her work. Matarić helped start the field of socially assistive robotics. Her robot Bandit gives kids words of encouragement.
